sn46.43:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the path crushing the army of Māra. Listen to that …
sn46.43:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the path crushing the army of Māra? It is the seven factors of enlightenment. What seven? The enlightenment factor of mindfulness … the enlightenment factor of equanimity. This is the path crushing the army of Māra."
